title: MuniCenter Records Office
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''MuniCenter Records Office''' was a room in the [[MuniCenter]] in [[Plawal Rift]] on [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]]. It contained the business and worker records for the three major companies of the Plawal area. In [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] it was run by a [[Bith/Legends|Bith]].

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']]
